title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
